data.title: Say Hello to Gigolo: Lisa Vanderpump’s Bold New Cocktail Lounge is Now Open Inside The Vanderpump Hotel
data.description: In Las Vegas, the new cocktail destination Gigolo has been launched at The Vanderpump Hotel by Lisa Vanderpump. The venue is described as a mix of moody and mysterious with a touch of sexy sophistication. Named after Vanderpump's dog, Gigolo, the hotel offers high-quality images for the cocktail lounge and rooms, as well as b-roll footage and soundbites of Lisa Vanderpump discussing the hotel. This new venture adds to the allure of The Vanderpump Hotel and continues Vanderpump's legacy in the hospitality industry.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Blasts Brian Armstrong Over CLARITY Act: 'You Are Full Of...'
data.description: JPMorgan Chase's CEO Jamie Dimon expressed strong opposition to the CLARITY Act in a recent interview, criticizing Coinbase's CEO Brian Armstrong for his lobbying efforts. Dimon specifically highlighted concerns regarding stablecoin yield, arguing that the bill would permit crypto firms to offer rewards to customers for holding stablecoins, creating unfair competition without the necessary consumer protections required of banks. Additionally, Dimon raised issues with the Act's Anti-Money Laundering and Bank Secrecy Act provisions, deeming them insufficient. He emphasized that allowing cryptocurrency firms to pay interest on deposits without adequate protection is unacceptable to banks. Despite Dimon's objections, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jefferson Solutions Group Announces Strategic Reorganization to Accelerate Long-Term Growth and Welcomes New Chief Growth Officer
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Jefferson Solutions Group revealed a strategic organizational restructuring aimed at bolstering its long-term growth plan and improving its capability to deliver mission-focused solutions to the federal government. Jefferson, a prominent provider in this field, seeks to optimize its operations to better serve its clients.

data.title: Consolidated Unaudited Interim Report of AS PRFoods for the 3rd quarter and 9 months of 2025/2026 financial year
data.description: During the third quarter of the financial year, PRFoods faced challenges due to a difficult economic landscape marked by low consumer demand, pricing pressures, and retail sector uncertainties in Estonia and neighboring markets. In response, management prioritized operational stability and cost management. However, decreased sales volumes heavily influenced the quarter's performance.

data.title: RestaurantFounder.com, Led by Aaron Gersonde, Announces Expanded Educational Initiative for Independent Restaurant Operators
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in Orlando, Florida, RestaurantFounder.com, overseen by Aaron Gersonde, a prominent hospitality developer, revealed plans to broaden its educational offerings and operational guidance for independent restaurant founders and hospitality entrepreneurs. The endeavor will provide valuable resources and training materials to support these individuals in their endeavors.

data.title: Pet Parents Are Throwing More Stylish Parties Than Ever -- And Yes, There Are Barkuterie Boards
data.description: Los Angeles, May 29, 2026 - The Party Goddess! and Marcy's Pet Kitchen have unveiled a new "Stylish Pet Party Playbook" to celebrate National Pet Appreciation Week. This free guide introduces a shift towards luxurious pet parties, moving away from traditional items like basic dog bowls and generic chew toys. The collaboration aims to elevate pet parties' experience, catering to the growing demand for upscale pet celebrations. The playbook offers innovative ideas and creative tips for pet owners looking to host memorable events for their beloved animals. This initiative reflects the changing trends in pet care, highlighting the importance of celebrating pets as valued family members. Explore the playbook to discover exclusive insights, from upscale decor to gourmet treats, designed to make every pet party a grand affair.

data.title: Flutter Entertainment PLC: Results of Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in New York, Dublin, and Toronto, the company reported that various resolutions were proposed at its Annual General Meeting.

data.title: Sui network faces another pause due to ongoing software bug, leading to almost 6 hours downtime post-update issue.
data.description: The network outage was triggered by a software bug in the update system, the same bug that caused disruptions in the protocol last Thursday. This recent incident led to almost six hours of downtime.

data.title: Oculis Announces Topline Results from DIAMOND Phase 3 Trials with OCS-01 in Diabetic Macular Edema
data.description: Switzerland's Oculis Holding AG revealed the findings of its Phase 3 DIAMOND-1 and DIAMOND-2 trials regarding OCS-01 eye drops for diabetic macular edema. The company, traded as Nasdaq: OCS and XICE: OCS, concentrates on developing solutions for neuro-ophthalmology and ophthalmology. This announcement was made on May 29, 2026.
